key_finding: Models suppress by concept class, not just by topic

authority_actors.pattern: Who has power gets unnamed across all topics

violence_language.pattern: Violence verbs dropped regardless of context

proper_nouns.pattern: Named entities systematically erased — 80% of coverage strips names

vulnerable_populations.pattern: Mentions of affected vulnerable groups dropped across categories

diplomatic_resolution.pattern: The mechanism of conflict resolution gets voided while the conflict itself is reported

bridge_words.finding: Models sever causal links between actors and outcomes
bridge_words.description: Keystone words are actors (trump, iran, israel). Bridge words are the verbs and outcomes that connect them (deal, agreement, failed, ships). Models keep the nouns loosely. They cut the connections.
